creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: osa
Date: Tue Aug  7 16:12:15 2012
New Revision: 302245
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302245

Log:
  Fix pkg-plist, bump PORTREVISION.
  
  Submitted:	Bryan Drewery <bryan@shatow.net>
  PR:		170398

Modified:
  head/www/rubygem-passenger/Makefile

Modified: head/www/rubygem-passenger/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/rubygem-passenger/Makefile	Tue Aug  7 15:57:26 2012	(r302244)
+++ head/www/rubygem-passenger/Makefile	Tue Aug  7 16:12:15 2012	(r302245)
@@ -6,6 +6,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	passenger
 PORTVERSION=	3.0.15
+PORTREVISION=	1
 CATEGORIES=	www rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	rubygem-
@@ -54,7 +55,6 @@ SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
 PLIST_FILES=	bin/passenger \
 		bin/passenger-config \
 		bin/passenger-install-apache2-module \
-		bin/passenger-make-enterprisey \
 		bin/passenger-memory-stats \
 		bin/passenger-status \
 		bin/passenger-install-nginx-module
